case_title: MANOR INVESTMENT INC DBA C & C CHECK CASHING CO. VS ROVIN JUSTIN INDDBA INSTAMAIL POSTAL SERVICE

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ROVIN JUSTIN INDDBA INSTAMAIL POSTAL SERVICE HEARING SET FOR DEC-11-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ROVIN JUSTIN INDDBA INSTAMAIL POSTAL SERVICE
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROVIN JUSTIN INDDBA INSTAMAIL POSTAL SERVICE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY MANOR INVESTMENT INC DBA C & C CHECK CASHING CO. AS TO DEFENDANT ROVIN JUSTIN INDDBA INSTAMAIL POSTAL SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-11-1992, GRANTED
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-14-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF OCT-02-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANOR INVESTMENT INC DBA C & C CHECK CASHING CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROVIN JUSTIN INDDBA INSTAMAIL POSTAL SERVICE $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $341.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
